text.title: User Story Mapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply User Story Mapping end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: tasks
step.action: Under each activity, list 2-5 user tasks.

step.name: stories
step.action: Per task, vertical column of stories; MVP at top.

step.name: slice
step.action: Draw horizontal slice = walking skeleton; next slice = Release 1.
